Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Continued To Jul-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for Dusan Semien.

Mrs. Navia stated that they had been dealing with some family issues and she was hoping that her client would be able to resolve things before final distribution, that so far it sounds like her client and his family have resolved the issues, and that she hopes to file her petition next week. The court reminded Mrs. Navia that there are issues regarding the inventory and appraisal. Mrs. Navia stated that she will keep that in mind. Status on close of estate is continued to July 31, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: W. James. Not reported.
